Class JRpc

java.lang.Object
org.consensusj.jrpc.JRpc
All Implemented Interfaces:
ToolProvider
public class JRpc extends Object implements ToolProvider
`jrpc` command-line tool.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      main method for jrpc tool.

      See JsonRpcToolOptions for options and your server's documentation or help for the methods and parameters. Users can use `-?` to get help on the tool or (usually) help <command> to get help from the server on a specific JSON-RPC method.

      Parameters:
      args - options, JSON-RPC method, JSON-RPC parameters

    • name

      Specified by:
      name in interface ToolProvider
